name: dtc-mcp
description: Connect Claude to your Klaviyo and Shopify data with 22 pre-built analytics tools. Context-optimized — uses ~80% less context than raw API wrappers.

klaviyo_api_key.title: Klaviyo API Key
klaviyo_api_key.description: Your Klaviyo private API key (starts with pk_). Find it at Settings > Account > API Keys.

shopify_store.title: Shopify Store Domain
shopify_store.description: Your Shopify store domain (e.g., your-store.myshopify.com). Leave empty for Klaviyo-only mode.

shopify_client_id.title: Shopify Client ID
shopify_client_id.description: App Client ID from the Shopify Partners Dashboard (for Dev Dashboard apps).

shopify_client_secret.title: Shopify Client Secret
shopify_client_secret.description: App Client Secret from the Shopify Partners Dashboard (starts with shpss_).

shopify_access_token.title: Shopify Access Token (Legacy)
shopify_access_token.description: Admin API access token for legacy custom apps (starts with shpat_). Use this OR Client ID/Secret, not both.

tools.name: klaviyo_list_segments
tools.description: All lists and segments with sizes

tools.name: shopify_product_performance
tools.description: Top products by revenue or units

tools.name: shopify_customer_segments
tools.description: Customer distribution by RFM, spend, country

tools.name: shopify_sales_breakdown
tools.description: Revenue/orders by country, channel, vendor, source

tools.name: shopify_product_analytics
tools.description: Product performance with margins and returns

tools.name: shopify_traffic_sources
tools.description: Sessions by source, landing page, or trend
